home.tagline: What can I help you with?
home.qaPlaceholder: Ask anything, or use @ to reference a notebook…

notebooks.title: Notebooks
notebooks.subtitle: Manage all your notebooks
notebooks.createDesc: Create a notebook to start organizing your knowledge.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Manage sources across all notebooks, {count} files in total
knowledge.graphEmptyDesc: Import sources and complete indexing to auto-generate the knowledge graph

chat.title: Chat
chat.welcomeSubtitle: Based on your knowledge base, I can help you analyze, summarize, and explore anything
chat.placeholder: Ask AI a question, or describe what you'd like to explore…
chat.sendHint: Press Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
chat.loadConvFailed: Failed to load conversation, please try again.
chat.loadMoreFailed: Failed to load more messages, please try again later.
chat.deepResearchPlaceholder: Describe the topic you want to research in depth…
chat.thinkingOn: Thinking mode ON — click to disable
chat.thinkingOff: Thinking mode OFF — click to enable

suggestedPrompts.analyzeThemes: Analyze core themes in my knowledge base
suggestedPrompts.generateSummary: Generate a structured summary of my research
suggestedPrompts.compareViews: Compare similar viewpoints across different sources
suggestedPrompts.generatePlan: Generate a study plan based on my notes

notebook.tocEmpty: Add headings to generate table of contents
notebook.selectionRewrite:
Rewrite this passage more clearly while preserving the meaning:

"{text}"
notebook.selectionCondense:
Condense this passage to keep only the core information:

"{text}"
notebook.continueWritingPrompt: Please continue writing the next paragraph based on the current note context
notebook.summarizeSourcesPrompt: Please summarize the key content and insights from all source materials in this notebook
notebook.trashConfirm: Move this notebook to trash? This action cannot be undone.
notebook.deleteConfirm: Delete notebook "{name}"? All content will be permanently lost.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themePresetDesc: Choose between LyraNote or Notion visual style
settings.fontSizeDesc: Base font size for the note editor
settings.autoSaveDesc: Auto-save drafts when leaving the editor

account.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters
account.changeFailed: Change failed, please check your current password

ai.providerDesc: Use OpenAI for OpenAI-compatible APIs; use LiteLLM for Gemini and other native models
ai.apiKeyDesc: Universal key for LLM, Embedding, and Reranker; each module can override individually
ai.baseUrlDesc: OpenAI-compatible proxy URL; leave empty for official API
ai.llmModelDesc: Primary model for conversations and reasoning
ai.embeddingNote: Leave API Key / URL empty to inherit from the main model config
ai.embeddingKeyDesc: Leave empty to use LLM API Key
ai.embeddingBaseUrlDesc: Leave empty to use LLM Base URL
ai.utilityNote: Optional — leave blank to inherit main model config
ai.utilityModelDesc: Used for query rewriting, scene classification, JSON generation, etc.
ai.utilityApiKeyDesc: Leave blank to inherit main model API key
ai.utilityBaseUrlDesc: Leave blank to inherit main model base URL
ai.sectionRerankerNote: Optional · Improves RAG accuracy, SiliconFlow free tier recommended
ai.rerankerKeyDesc: Leave empty to use LLM API Key
ai.rerankerBaseUrlDesc: Leave empty to use LLM Base URL
ai.rerankerModelDesc: Used to score and rerank candidate documents
ai.tavilyKeyDesc: Web search feature; leave empty to disable
ai.perplexityKeyDesc: Scheduled tasks prefer Perplexity search when set; falls back to Tavily if empty
ai.sectionImageGenNote: Optional · AI-generated anime avatar for your public page
ai.imageGenKeyDesc: SiliconFlow API key recommended (supports domestic payment)
ai.imageGenBaseUrlDesc: Leave empty to use SiliconFlow default

personality.aiNameDesc: Your preferred name for the AI assistant
personality.occupationDesc: Helps AI better understand your background
personality.interestsDesc: Topics and areas you focus on
personality.customPromptDesc: Appended to the default system prompt to customize AI behavior
personality.customPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Keep it concise, use bullet points, avoid lengthy paragraphs.

storage.minioPublicUrlDesc: Browser-accessible URL for presigned links. Leave empty to use the endpoint address.

security.thirdPartyDesc: Link accounts to enable third-party login

memory.whatIsDesc: AI learns about you through conversations — your preferences, facts, and skills. You can view, edit, or delete any memory entry below.
memory.globalDocDesc: Markdown format, read by AI in every conversation
memory.placeholder:
e.g.
## About Me
- Software engineer focusing on AI
- Researching LLMs in knowledge management

## Preferences
- Keep answers concise, use bullet points
- Primarily in English
memory.noMemories: No memories yet. AI will learn about you during conversations.

publicHome.title: Public Homepage
publicHome.desc: Generate and review the AI-written public knowledge homepage before it goes live.
publicHome.backfillFailed: Failed to backfill approved public portrait
publicHome.draftEmpty: Generate a draft from current public notebooks to preview the homepage narrative.
publicHome.approvedEmpty: Once you approve a draft, the public landing page will start showing the AI-generated profile.

mcp.httpHint: For most modern remote MCP servers (e.g. Excalidraw, Notion)
mcp.sseHint: For legacy SSE protocol servers; prefer HTTP first
mcp.commandRequired: Command is required for stdio mode
mcp.urlRequired: URL is required for HTTP/SSE mode
mcp.description: Configure external MCP tool servers. The AI assistant will automatically discover and call tools during conversations.
mcp.empty: No MCP servers yet. Click "Add Server" to get started.

errors.pageErrorRetry: Please retry or refresh the page.

validation.usernameMin: Username must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidImageUrl: Please enter a valid image URL

setup.wizardDesc: Complete the following steps to start using LyraNote
setup.personalizeDesc: Tell AI about yourself for more precise help
setup.customPromptPlaceholder: You are a professional AI assistant. Answer questions in a rigorous, concise manner…
setup.customPromptHint: Leave empty to use the default System Prompt
setup.fillApiKeyFirst: Please enter your API Key first
setup.requestFailed: Request failed, please check your network
setup.emailHint: Used for account recovery and notifications
setup.llmProviderHint: Choose OpenAI for compatible APIs; LiteLLM for Gemini etc.
setup.llmApiKeyHint: Used for LLM / Embedding / Reranker; can be overridden per module
setup.llmBaseUrlHint: Leave unchanged for official endpoints; enter full URL for proxies
setup.embSectionTitle: Embedding Model · Leave blank to inherit main config
setup.rerankerSectionTitle: Reranker Model · Leave blank to inherit main config
setup.tavilyHint: Used for web search; leave blank to disable search tool
setup.aiNameHint: This is how you'll refer to your AI assistant
setup.occupationHint: Helps AI understand your professional background
setup.occupationPlaceholder: e.g. Researcher, Engineer, Student, Product Manager
setup.preferencesHint: AI will prioritize these areas in its responses
setup.preferencesPlaceholder: e.g. Machine learning, product design, investment research, frontend dev…

login.loginFailed: Invalid username or password, please try again
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue using your knowledge base

marketing.heroSubtitle: Enhance your notes with vector retrieval. Let AI organize, analyze, and discover deep connections in your knowledge.
marketing.knowledgeHeroTitle: A living public notebook of research, interests, and knowledge work.
marketing.featureRagDesc: Semantic search powered by vector embeddings, precisely recalling the most relevant knowledge snippets.
marketing.featureAiDesc: Chat with your notes — AI helps you summarize, compare, and deep-read across multiple sources.
marketing.featureTaskDesc: Subscribe to RSS feeds and keywords, automatically track industry trends, and generate research briefs on schedule.
marketing.featureShareDesc: Publish notebooks as beautiful public pages to share your research and knowledge.
marketing.title: Explore Public Notebooks
marketing.subtitle: Browse published research notes and knowledge compilations
marketing.knowledgeArchiveDesc: A complete archive of public notebooks and knowledge outputs.
marketing.portraitGeneratedNote: This public portrait is generated only from published notebook titles, summaries, public content, and publication dates. It does not use private portrait data or unpublished material.
marketing.archiveIntroNote: Before a public portrait is approved, the homepage stays in archive mode and shows only public work.
marketing.portraitDerived: Derived from {notebooks} public notebooks and {sources} sources
marketing.featuredResearchDesc: Curated public notebooks highlighted by the current homepage draft.
marketing.recentResearchDesc: The latest public notebooks and research outputs.
marketing.researchTimelineTitle: How the current public knowledge work has evolved
marketing.researchTrajectoryDesc: A sparse timeline of public milestones showing how the current body of work has gradually taken shape.
marketing.knowledgeMapDesc: A public map of mastered terrain, active study, and emerging interests inferred from the published archive.
marketing.publicSignalsDesc: A lightweight reading of the public archive based on topic spread, average notebook depth, and publishing continuity.
marketing.signalStatusEarly: The public portrait is still taking shape
marketing.selectedNotebooksDesc: A short reading list that best supports the portrait with concrete public work.
marketing.publicArchiveDesc: Featured, recent, and complete public notebooks gathered into one reading archive.
marketing.emptyDesc: No notebooks have been published yet. Go to the workspace to create and publish your first one.
marketing.notFoundTitle: Notebook not found or not public
marketing.emptyNotebook: This notebook has no notes yet

deepResearch.requestFailed: Deep research request failed, please try again.
deepResearch.selectNotebookToSave: Select a notebook before saving this as a note.
deepResearch.saveTargetTitle: Choose a notebook to save into
deepResearch.saveTargetDesc: Save “{title}” into a notebook. Once chosen, later saves from this research will default to the same notebook.
deepResearch.saveTargetEmpty: You don't have any notebooks yet. Create one now and save this research result immediately.
deepResearch.saveTargetCreateHint: You can also create a new notebook and save this research result right away.
deepResearch.timeDeep: Ready in just a few minutes

sourceDetail.chunkCoarseDesc: ~600 chars per chunk, suitable for long document overviews
sourceDetail.chunkFineDesc: ~256 chars per chunk, suitable for precise Q&A
sourceDetail.chunkCustomDesc: Manually set chunk size and overlap
sourceDetail.processingFailedDesc: Unable to extract text content. Please check the file format.
sourceDetail.processingTimeoutDesc: The indexing task timed out. Click Re-split to retry.
sourceDetail.deleteWarning: Deleting will also remove all chunks and vector indexes. This action <danger>cannot be undone</danger>.
sourceDetail.splitterAutoDesc: Try semantic chunking first, fall back to recursive character splitting
sourceDetail.splitterSemanticDesc: AI-detected semantic boundaries, ignores fixed character counts, best for long text
sourceDetail.splitterRecursiveDesc: Rule-based splitting by character count + overlap, precise and predictable
sourceDetail.minChunkSizeDesc: Chunks shorter than this will be discarded
sourceDetail.bindDesc: After binding, this source becomes exclusive to the notebook, prioritized during AI Q&A.
sourceDetail.deleteAllChunks: and all its chunks will be permanently removed.

importSource.uploadFailed: Upload failed, please check your network and try again
importSource.globalDesc: Upload to the global knowledge base, searchable by AI in all conversations.
importSource.notebookDesc: Add study materials for a notebook, AI will answer based on these sources.
importSource.selectNotebookDesc: Select a notebook and upload content, AI will answer based on these sources.
importSource.webHint: Supports web pages, articles, and online document links
importSource.fileHint: Supports PDF, Word, TXT, Markdown, MP3, MP4

copilot.title: AI Assistant
copilot.greeting: Ask questions based on your notes, and AI will provide answers with cited sources.
copilot.sendHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
copilot.errorRetry: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again.
copilot.relevantSourcesGlobalDesc: Relevant snippets retrieved from your global knowledge base.

editor.polishTitle: AI polishes selected text in place
editor.blockMetaUnavailable: Edit metadata will be connected soon
editor.blockMetaComingSoon: This footer will show the last editor and update time later

portrait.title: Lyra's View of You
portrait.dataAccumulating: Building your profile — interact with Lyra more to generate
portrait.notGeneratedDesc: After more conversations with Lyra, she'll automatically form a deep understanding of you
portrait.synthesizing: Synthesizing in background, refresh in a moment
portrait.triggerFailed: Trigger failed, please try again later
portrait.synthesisInProgress: Lyra is getting to know you…
portrait.synthesisTimeout: Synthesis timed out — refresh to check

tasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
tasks.emptyDesc: Click "New Task" in the top right, or tell AI in chat to create one
tasks.createDesc: Create a periodic content task executed automatically by AI
tasks.topicPlaceholder: e.g. Latest LLM developments, RAG techniques
tasks.feedPlaceholder: Paste feed URL, press Enter to confirm

tasks.runFailed: Execution failed, please try again later
tasks.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
